URI.MakeAbsolute TYPE: bool VERSION: 2.1.0 DEFAULT: false --DESCRIPTION-- <p> Converts all URIs into absolute forms. This is useful when the HTML being filtered assumes a specific base path, but will actually be viewed in a different context (and setting an alternate base URI is not possible). %URI.Base must be set for this directive to work. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
